title: Forgelin-Continuous
body:
Forgelin-Continuous is an updated version of Shadowfact's Forgelin, which allows developers to write mods in latest versions of Kotlin.

## Disclaimer
This mod cannot be used as replacement of or alongside with Shadowfact's Forgelin, as the bundled Kotlin libraries would cause confliction.

## For Users
This mod does not add any additional content to gameplay, but only used as an library mod.

## For Developers
Bundled kotlin libraries' version can be seen [here](https://github.com/ChAoSUnItY/Forgelin-Continuous/releases).

For devs, heads to [here](https://github.com/ChAoSUnItY/Forgelin-Continuous) for more information.
